hero.name: Nhlanhla Junior Malaza
hero.title: Unjiniyela Wesoftware, Unjiniyela we-DevOps & Inzexpert ye-AI Integrations
hero.subtitle: Unjiniyela wesoftware othanda umsebenzi wakhe, olungele ukufunda nokuzijwayeza kunoma yimuphi umuntu wesoftware. Ngihlale ngizama ukuzithuthukisa kanye namakhono ami. Ngiyajabula ukusebenza nabanye naseqenjini.
hero.keyboard_desc: Skrola ikhasi ulandele ikhiybhodi, bese usho phezu kwamakinobho esigabeni samakhono

skills.label: Amakhono Ekhiybhodi
skills.heading: Amakhono
skills.idle_desc_desktop: Hambela kulesi sigaba, bese usho phezu kwengcezu ukuze uhlole ingxenye yezinto zami.
skills.idle_desc_mobile: Skrola ungene kulesi sigaba, bese usho phezu kwengcezu ukuze uhlole ingxenye yezinto zami.

services.label: Engikwenzayo
services.heading: Izinsizakalo
services.subheading: Indawo ephelele yezinsizakalo zokuthuthukisa ukuze izimvo zakho zibe yiqiniso ngobuchwepheshe banamuhla.
services.item_0_desc: Ukwakha izinhlelo ze-web ezisetshenziswa ngendlela ekhethekile, ezisebenza kahle, kusetshenziswa izinsizakalo zanamuhla njengeReact, Next.js, neVue.js.
services.item_1_desc: Ukwakha izinhlelo ze-mobile ezisebenza kuzo zombili izinhlelo ngeReact Native neFlutter ze-iOS ne-Android.
services.item_2_desc: Ukwakha nokufaka isikhungo se-cloud esikhulayo ku-AWS, GCP, ne-Azure.
services.item_3_desc: Ukufaka amakhono e-AI nokufunda kwezinto eziphilayo ezinhlelweni ukuze kuzenzeke imisebenzi ngokwayo nokuletha izimpendulo ezihlakanipha kubasebenzisi.
services.item_4_desc: Ukwakha ama-API anekhono, ama-microservice, nezakhiwo ze-database ezinkampanini ezinkulu.
services.item_5_desc: Ukufaka izinhlelo ze-CI/CD ezizenzakalayo, ukufaka izinto ezisezitsheni, nezakhiwo zemishini.

newsletter.heading: Bhalisa Ku-Nuusletha Yami
newsletter.subheading: Thola izibuyekezo zakamuva ngemisebenzi ye-web, izindaba zobuchwepheshe, nokuqukethwe okukhethekile okufikiswa ngqo ku-inbox yakho. Akukho spam, hoxisa noma nini.
newsletter.disclaimer: Ngokubhalisa, uyavuma ukwamukelwa kwama-imeyili avela kimi. Ungahoxisa noma nini.
newsletter.toast_success_desc: Siyabonga ngokubhalisa. Hlola i-inbox yakho ukuqinisekisa.
newsletter.toast_error_desc: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle. Sicela uzame futhi.
newsletter.toast_network_desc: Ayikwazanga ukuxhumeka. Sicela uhlole uxhumeko lwakho uzame futhi.
